description: Classic ballerina shoes by catwalk with a blunt toe cup and an elasticated mouth for the perfect Fit. Ballet flats need not be just a summer indulgence with their sweet, girly style - this pair adds a party girl glam with its shiny synthetic leather overlay. Wear this with form fitting denims or short skirts for a house party to add instant glitz to your ensemble and be charmed out of your haughty stilettos.UpperSynthetic leather upper with fabric overlaysReinforced patent leather overlays on the toe box and heel cup for maximum comfortElasticated mouth for a customised fitSoft footbed for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with herringbone grooves on a lightly upraised heel and forefootshoe CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
